problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: If Reservoir computing with physical substrate is applied to alphafold, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Security audit with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
